use std::fs::File;
use std::io::{BufRead, BufReader};

// GOOD: stream lines with BufReader
fn count_matching_lines(path: &str, pattern: &str) -> usize {
    let file = File::open(path).unwrap();
    let reader = BufReader::new(file);
    reader.lines()
        .filter_map(|line| line.ok())
        .filter(|line| line.contains(pattern))
        .count()
}

fn find_first_error(path: &str) -> Option<String> {
    let file = File::open(path).unwrap();
    let reader = BufReader::new(file);
    reader.lines()
        .filter_map(|line| line.ok())
        .find(|line| line.contains("ERROR"))
}

fn check_config_valid(path: &str) -> bool {
    let file = File::open(path).unwrap();
    let reader = BufReader::new(file);
    reader.lines()
        .filter_map(|line| line.ok())
        .any(|line| line.starts_with("version ="))
}
